rationale: No new qualitative developments affecting Romania's security or economy; Iran deal and Ukraine war continue as background.

top_events.title: Iran deal close; Hormuz reopening tied to agreement
top_events.summary: US and Iran signal a deal is near; Hormuz reopening would ease energy costs for Romania indirectly through lower EU gas/oil prices.

top_events.title: Lebanon fighting continues amid Iran deal talks
top_events.summary: Israel strikes south Lebanon while US-Iran talks proceed; continued Middle East instability keeps energy market uncertainty elevated for Romania.

top_events.title: 117 million people displaced worldwide including Lebanon war victims
top_events.summary: Global displacement figures rise; Lebanon war adds to regional migration pressure that could indirectly affect Romania's eastern neighborhood.
